Package neqsim.physicalproperties.interfaceproperties.solidadsorption

Class AbstractAdsorptionModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.physicalproperties.interfaceproperties.solidadsorption.AbstractAdsorptionModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, AdsorptionInterface, ThermodynamicConstantsInterface
Direct Known Subclasses:
BETAdsorption, FreundlichAdsorption, LangmuirAdsorption, SipsAdsorption
public abstract class AbstractAdsorptionModel extends Object implements AdsorptionInterface, Serializable
Abstract base class for adsorption models.

Provides common functionality for all adsorption isotherm implementations including:

  • Database parameter loading
  • Surface excess calculations
  • Multi-component handling
  • Adsorbent material properties
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

      the isotherm type enum value

      protected abstract void loadParameters(int phaseNum)
      Load model parameters from the database for all components.
      Parameters:
      phaseNum - the phase number to use for component lookup

    • setSolidMaterial

      public void setSolidMaterial(String solidM)
      Set the solid adsorbent material.
      Specified by:
      setSolidMaterial in interface AdsorptionInterface
      Parameters:
      solidM - the solid material identifier (e.g. "AC", "Zeolite 13X", "Silica Gel")

      public String getSolidMaterial()
      Get the current solid adsorbent material name.
      Returns:
      the solid material identifier

    • getSurfaceExcess

      public double getSurfaceExcess(int component)
      Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by index.
      Specified by:
      getSurfaceExcess in interface AdsorptionInterface
      Parameters:
      component - the component index (0-based)
      Returns:
      surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • getSurfaceExcess

      public double getSurfaceExcess(String componentName)
      Get the surface excess (amount adsorbed) for a component by name.
      Specified by:
      getSurfaceExcess in interface AdsorptionInterface
      Parameters:
      componentName - the component name
      Returns:
      surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • getTotalSurfaceExcess

      public double getTotalSurfaceExcess()
      Get the total surface excess of all components.
      Specified by:
      getTotalSurfaceExcess in interface AdsorptionInterface
      Returns:
      total surface excess in mol/kg adsorbent

    • getAdsorbedPhaseMoleFraction

      public double getAdsorbedPhaseMoleFraction(int component)
      Get the mole fraction of a component in the adsorbed phase.
      Parameters:
      component - the component index
      Returns:
      mole fraction in adsorbed phase (0 to 1)

    • getSelectivity

      public double getSelectivity(int component1, int component2, int phaseNum)
      Get the adsorption selectivity between two components.

      Selectivity is defined as:

      $$\alpha_{i/j} = \frac{x_i / y_i}{x_j / y_j}$$

      where x is adsorbed phase mole fraction and y is gas phase mole fraction.

      Parameters:
      component1 - index of first component
      component2 - index of second component (reference)
      phaseNum - the bulk phase number
      Returns:
      selectivity (dimensionless)

    • calculateSurfaceExcessMolFractions

      protected void calculateSurfaceExcessMolFractions()
      Calculate normalized mole fractions in adsorbed phase.

      Get the BET surface area of the adsorbent.
